subjects.name: gpt-tool-agent-responses
subjects.system_prompt: Use Analyze file when source-file context is required. Do not use tools for trivial chat.

tools.name: Analyze file
tools.description: Read and analyze a specific source file before answering.
tools.output: payments.go: ChargeCustomer validates idempotency keys before capture. refunds.go: RefundCustomer creates a reversal. ledger.go: RecordRefund writes a refund entry to the ledger.
